needs_human: Imbued god capes (deadman) 29613/29615/29617 — wiki lead only states 75 Magic to IMBUE; equip req unclear. Existing file rows for base imbued capes say magic 50, leagues-locked variants say 75. Reconcile before adding.
Sailing cape 31288/31290 — skillcape implies {sailing: 99}, but 'sailing' is a new skill key absent from the existing requirements file; confirm plugin supports it before adding.

Seeking arrows 33553/33559/33565/33571/33577/33583/33589/33595/33601 — Blood Moon Rises silver arrows; wiki pages state no equip reqs, but base tier arrows carry ranged reqs in the file (e.g. dragon arrow 60) and Seeking broad arrows likely inherit broad-arrow slayer 55. Unverified — decide policy.
